name: Braised Beef with Noodles
recipeInstructions:
- For each serving: Combine 3/4 cup beef mixture and 3/4 cup noodles.
1. Brown the beef cubes in a saucepan until well browned.
2. Add water, salt, pepper, and bay leaf to the saucepan. Cover and cook over low heat until the beef is almost tender – about 1 hour.
3. Add onion and celery. Continue cooking until the meat and vegetables are tender – about 20 minutes.
4. Remove the bay leaf.
5. Mix flour and water in a separate bowl until smooth. Stir this mixture into the beef sauce. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened – about 2 minutes.
6. Serve over noodles.
Note: For best results, use a 1-1/2 pound blade chuck steak. Separate lean meat from fat and bone. Cut the meat into 3/4-inch cubes. Divide the beef cubes in half. Use half (about 1 cup) for Braised Beef with Noodles. Save the remaining 1 cup for Beef and Peppers (p. 34).
